title: Analytics - Product Support Opened
scenario: Verify that opening the Product Support page logs a "product_support_opened" event and that event count increases after navigating to Support > Product Support on mobile.
steps: In Firebase, confirm default elements are present: graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment.
On mobile, navigate to Support > Product Support.
Wait a few hours and confirm the event count increases.
expected: The event \"product_support_opened\" is logged when the Product Support page is opened. Default elements are present in Firebase, and the event count increases after a few hours on mobile.
